title: Tower
tagline: Climb row by row; pick the safe tile or fall.
mechanic: Each row has `tiles` cells with `danger` fatal ones. A safe pick climbs you up and raises the multiplier to RTP ÷ p^rows-climbed (p = survival per row). Cash out any time. Mines, but with a constant per-step hazard.
showcases: ComplexMath ladder with constant per-step survival
per-row choice (options) vs Crash/Chicken's single action
mathTest: Constant-EV ladder: `--compare` across cash-out depths is flat at RTP. The built-in simulator climbs one row and cashes, already measuring 0.99.
